# KP Solutions

> Custom software for established operators. Websites are one deliverable shape among many; the product is software that solves operational problems. KP Solutions is a one-person bespoke software studio, working operator-to-operator rather than agency-to-procurement.

## Canonical pages

- [Home](https://kpsolutions.io/): Overview of KP Solutions and how the studio works.
- [What we build](https://kpsolutions.io/build): The five shapes of bespoke software — custom platforms, internal tools, integrations & automation, legacy replacement, and AI-visible web presence.
- [Work](https://kpsolutions.io/work): Potter Sanctuary — a residency-booking platform with payments, customer accounts, and operator tooling, built and shipped in four weeks.
- [Process](https://kpsolutions.io/process): The four-week build — brief on Monday, live four Fridays later, fixed fee, code owned by you.
- [About](https://kpsolutions.io/about): The founder, the positioning, and what the studio does and doesn't take on.
- [Contact](https://kpsolutions.io/contact): How to start a conversation about a project.
